channel.title: GitHub Assembly Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Assembly in GitHub

item.title: vxunderground/MalwareSourceCode
item.description: Collection of malware source code for a variety of platforms in an array of different programming languages.

item.title: leachim6/hello-world
item.description: Hello world in every computer language. Thanks to everyone who contributes to this, make sure to see CONTRIBUTING.md for contribution instructions!

item.title: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
item.description: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

item.title: cirosantilli/x86-bare-metal-examples
item.description: Dozens of minimal operating systems to learn x86 system programming. Tested on Ubuntu 17.10 host in QEMU 2.10 and real hardware. Userland cheat at: https://github.com/cirosantilli/linux-kernel-module-cheat#userland-assembly ARM baremetal setup at: https://github.com/cirosantilli/linux-kernel-module-cheat#baremetal-setup 学习x86系统编程的数十个最小操作系统。 已在QE…

item.title: intel/optimization-manual
item.description: Contains the source code examples described in the "Intel® 64 and IA-32 Architectures Optimization Reference Manual"

item.title: BLAKE3-team/BLAKE3
item.description: the official Rust and C implementations of the BLAKE3 cryptographic hash function

item.title: microsoft/MS-DOS
item.description: The original sources of MS-DOS 1.25 and 2.0, for reference purposes

item.title: SpinalHDL/VexRiscv
item.description: A FPGA friendly 32 bit RISC-V CPU implementation

item.title: Rangi42/polishedcrystal
item.description: An upgrade to Pokémon Crystal. Brings features and content up to date, and adds some original content.

item.title: dspinellis/unix-history-repo
item.description: Continuous Unix commit history from 1970 until today
